case_scope: Same geometry and fluid conditions as Case 01, with explicit material selection and mass calculation, plus §9.1 preliminary mechanical check on tube allowable stress (TASK-017 §9.1 — already implemented in preliminary_checker.py). Upstream paths exercised: Case 01 + TASK-017 MaterialSelector + MassCalculator + PreliminaryMechanicalChecker §9.1. Pressure drop is explicitly NOT_COMPUTABLE (TASK-020+ scope; excluded from TASK-019 by frozen design §6).
case_title: Double-pipe heat balance + materials + mass + preliminary mechanical check
amendment_basis: TASK-019 design-amendment round 2026-07-08 (PR branch codex/task-019-freeze-validation-vectors). Freezes the canonical case input vectors and the canonical expected output vectors for the TASK-017-authorized fields (material_selection, mass_kg, preliminary_mechanical_check status). Case 01 input vectors are referenced by case_id (TASK-019-GOLDEN-01) and inherit the frozen values from case_01_heat_balance_rating.json. Pressure-drop remains NOT_COMPUTABLE. No production calculation was executed to derive these frozen values; mass values are derived from the geometric inputs of Case 01 + the documented densities of SS304 (per TASK-017 approved material catalog). Preliminary mechanical check status is derived from the documented SS304 allowable stress at the design envelope (TASK-017 §9.1).

material_selection.design_code_id: ASME BPVC Section VIII Div 1 (TASK-017 approved rule-pack; design_code_id per TASK-017 catalog)
material_selection.shell_material_id: SS304 (stainless steel 304, per TASK-017 approved material catalog)
material_selection.tube_material_id: SS304 (stainless steel 304, per TASK-017 approved material catalog)

material_catalog_bridge.amendment_002f_scope: TASK-019-GOLDEN-02 case-bound Material Catalog Bridge Contract (frozen input; not a runtime catalog lookup; not an adapter-generated value)

provenance.source_reference: TASK-017 approved material catalog, SS304 entry, design_envelope_revision (TASK-017 catalog revision 2026-07-08)

identity.standard_or_spec_reference: ASME BPVC Section VIII Div 1 (TASK-017 approved rule-pack; design_code_id per TASK-017 catalog)

provenance.source_reference: TASK-017 approved material catalog, SS304 entry, design_envelope_revision (TASK-017 catalog revision 2026-07-08)

slice3a_blocked_field_paths.slice3a_blocked_field_paths_note: Each TBD-by-Slice-3A marker below is the audit-trail record of an authorized TASK-019 expected_output field path that would have been computed by the upstream TASK-017 chain had the Slice 3A adapter been wired up. The marker field names use the <real_path_leaf>_pending convention so the audit trail maps 1-to-1 to the real authorized field paths above; the marker values carry the Slice 3A production-source symbol that the future Slice 3A adapter will project into the field. The Slice 2 _materialize_not_computable_actual_output walks the expected_output subtree for TBD-by-Slice-N markers and surfaces them as actual_output.blocked_fields per the P0-1 contract. pressure-drop is NOT enumerated here (TASK-020+ excluded; surfaced separately as a pressure-drop per_field record).

amendment_1_skeleton_note: Slice 1 fixture-shape reproducibility was preserved (case_scope / case_title / schema_version / tolerance_profile_id / provenance_profile_id / license_boundary_attestation / pressure_drop_excluded_from_taska_019). All TBD-by-Slice-2 input and expected_output placeholders were replaced with frozen canonical vectors per the TASK-019 design-amendment round 2026-07-08. The previously-TBD 'case_01_input' and 'case_01_outputs' reference placeholders are now explicit case_id cross-references (TASK-019-GOLDEN-01) to keep the cross-case link auditable without re-inventing the geometry. Pressure drop remains NOT_COMPUTABLE. No TASK-020+ field was introduced. The expected_output subtree additionally carries a sibling slice3a_blocked_field_paths block: each TBD-by-Slice-3A marker is the P0-1-contract audit-trail record of an authorized TASK-019 expected_output field path that would have been computed had the Slice 3A adapter been wired up; the marker field names use the <real_path_leaf>_pending convention so the audit trail maps 1-to-1 to the frozen fields above without overwriting them.
